snippet.title: Bosanac kupio pravi vlak u voznom stanju
snippet.description:
Mladen Cvitanoviƒá iz Golubinja kod ≈Ωepƒça svjetski je putnik. Bio je najmlaƒëi vojnik Vijetnamskog rata, radio na naftnim platformama, boksao u Norve≈°koj i pobijedio 94 puta. Do≈æivio je desetak poraza. Njegov djed je bio ≈æeljezniƒçar i u spomen na njega kupio je prvo parnu lokomotivu iz ≈Ωeljezare Zenica u ispravnom stanju a onda i dva vagona od hrvatskih ≈æeljeznica. Mladen svako jutro trƒçi osam kilometara. Ima svoju teretanu gdje vje≈æba a proizvodi i domaƒáa jaja koja prodaje trgovinama i seljacima koji ne ≈æele uzgajati koke. Mladenova namjera je obnoviti Titov plavi voz koji ƒáe biti turistiƒçka atrakcija u Centralnoj Bosni, odnosno BiH. Zavr≈°io je i projekt ≈æeljezniƒçke stanice a od jeseni za turiste ƒáe biti na raspolaganju i jedan helikopter za obilazak poznatih turistiƒçkih destinacija. Mladen je u vojsci vozio ne samo helikoptere nego i avione. Svjetski putnik iz ≈Ωepƒça ima oko 65 godina ali i toliko ideja kao da mu je 35 godina. en.title: Bosnian man bought a real train
en.description: Mladen Cvitanoviƒá from Golubinje, near ≈Ωepƒçe, is a world traveler. He was the youngest Vietnam War soldier, worked on oil rigs, boxed in Norway, and won 94 times. He suffered a dozen defeats. His grandfather was a railway worker and in his memory he first bought a steam locomotive from the Zenica Ironworks in good condition, and then two wagons from the Croatian Railways. Mladen runs eight kilometres every morning. It has its own gym where it exercises and also produces homemade eggs which it sells to shops and farmers who do not want to grow chickens. Mladen's intention is to restore Tito's blue train, which will be a tourist attraction in Central Bosnia, ie BiH. The project of the railway station has also been completed, and from the autumn, a helicopter will be available for tourists to tour well-known tourist destinations. Mladen drove, not only helicopters, but also planes in the army. The world traveler from ≈Ωepƒçe is about 65 years old, but he has as many ideas as if he were 35 years old. Take a look at this unusual story from Golubinja near ≈Ωepƒçe.

snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äì the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äì search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva ƒçetniƒçke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaƒçko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom dru≈°tvu pjeva ƒçetniƒçku pjesmu posveƒáenu ƒçetniƒçkom vojvodi Momƒçilu ƒêujiƒáu, ratnom zloƒçincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruƒçak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "na≈°u pjesmu", misleƒái na "Tamo daleko". On je poƒçeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevu≈°io za njima, malo iznenaƒëen ≈°to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i za≈°utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekav≈°i da je za≈°utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ƒêujiƒáa".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Periƒá velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veƒá od poƒçetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- ≈Ýta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ƒêujiƒáeva kokarda na glavi - ka≈æe sporni stih, a te≈°ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop Momƒçilo ƒêujiƒá ƒçetniƒçki je vojvoda i ratni zloƒçinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zloƒçina na ovim podruƒçjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. ƒêujiƒáevi ƒçetnici jedan od najveƒáih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleƒëu Omi≈°a kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.

Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebaƒçko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom dru≈°tvu pjeva ƒçetniƒçku pjesmu posveƒáenu ƒçetniƒçkom vojvodi Momƒçilu ƒêujiƒáu, ratnom zloƒçincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ruƒçak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "na≈°u pjesmu", misleƒái na "Tamo daleko". On je poƒçeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevu≈°io za njima, malo iznenaƒëen ≈°to nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i za≈°utio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekav≈°i da je za≈°utio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode ƒêujiƒáa".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Periƒá velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a veƒá od poƒçetka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- ≈Ýta se ono na Dinari sjaji, ƒêujiƒáeva kokarda na glavi - ka≈æe sporni stih, a te≈°ko je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop Momƒçilo ƒêujiƒá ƒçetniƒçki je vojvoda i ratni zloƒçinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zloƒçina na ovim podruƒçjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. ƒêujiƒáevi ƒçetnici jedan od najveƒáih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleƒëu Omi≈°a kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover‚Äôs Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚Äî and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

0:31 ‚Äî The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚Äî A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚Äî The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

snippet.title: Zajedno imaju 130 godina
snippet.description:
Radoslav ƒêekiƒá iz Bugojna i njegova Zastava 1500 zajedno imaju 130 godina. Radoslav ima 88 a njegov automobil 42 godine. Kupio ga je davne 1979. godine u Zenici. Rade ka≈æe da je u to vrijeme Zastavu vozio samo predsjednik opƒáine Bugojno i rijetki pojedinci. Zastava je u odliƒçnom stanju. Njegov oldtimer nikada nije imao veƒái kvar da nije mogao voziti a za 42 godine pre≈°ao je 110000 kilometara. Danas ga rade provoza do svoga placa a prije nekoliko godina vozio se svojim ljubimcem i u Banjaluku. Iako ima dobrih ponuda da ga proda Radoslav jo≈° uvijek nije odluku o prodaji. Misli da ƒáe to biti u ovoj godini. Mnogi mu ka≈æu: "Vidi dobrog dede a jo≈° boljeg auta", ≈°ali se Rade. Pogledajte neobiƒçan video iz Bugojna.

snippet.title: Harmonika - lepeza pita. Vruƒáa, lisnata omiljena za pola sata gotova! Malo je eksplodirala.
snippet.description:
Malo drugaƒçiji naƒçin slaganja pite. Ovako pravim godinama. U fil se mo≈æe dodati rendani krompir, mladi luk ili praziluk, spanaƒá, blitva..
#pita #recept #harmonikapita
PISANI RECEPT NA  BLOGU:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/harmonika-lepeza-pita.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 3 jajeta

- 1 ka≈°iƒçica soli (ako je sir jako slan stavite manje soli)

- 6 ka≈°ika kisele pavlake

- 300 gr. sitnog sira

- 500 ml. mleka

- 100 ml. ulja

- 500 gr. kora za pitu



Umutite jaja, dodajte sve ostale sastojke i izme≈°ajte.

Tepsiju podma≈æite uljem i na dno ra≈°irite jednu koru. Ostale listove kora savijte kao kada pravite lepezu i slazite jednu uz drugu dok ne popunite tepsiju. Tepsija je manja, otprilike kao polovina tepsije od rerne.

Preko slo≈æenih kora sipajte fil, sipajte izmeƒëu kora. Ostavite da upije i odstoji jedno 15 minuta pa stavite u zagrejanu rernu na 200 stepeni.

Peƒçe se oko 35 minuta.

How‚Äôs this for an all-German showdown... Audi RS6 v BMW M5 Competition v Mercedes-AMG E63 S! 

All three of these contenders can produce a serious amount of power. First up we‚Äôve got Mat in his RS6, which is powered by a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 and can put down 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him we have the new BMW M5 Competition, with a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 delivering 625hp and 750Nm. 

And then finally we have the AMG E63 S, which is housing a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which produces 612hp and 850Nm. 

So how do you think this will play out? The M5 puts down the most power, so will it snatch the win? Or will the Audi‚Äôs Quattro AWD prove a decisive on this wet track? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: MIC-MC-GOD MODE (OFFICIAL AUDIO)
snippet.description:
MIC-MC : https://www.instagram.com/micmc_93/

TEKST:

Koliko svez brate
vi morate da vezbate
jer repovati ne znate
sve znate,face su vam bez brate
sta je to u trendingu mora da me zezate
predahnem 

Ne mogu vise da gledam ova sranja,dranja,pomilovanja
imam nocne more sanjam

celija mozdana mi manja kazu mi da sam bog
bolje bi bilo bogu da se klanjas 

ne mogu stati ja dok ne dodje do klanja
jebeno lud evo mentalnog mi stanja 
eto me svud samo ganjam
vidi mi trud vidi kralja 
hejtere udarim preko glave poput thorovoga malja 

brate udarim kako valja,neko mi tamo obraz kalja 
habada babada babada babada govore glupi ljudi puni znanja
koliko repera trebam da pokidam da bi razumeli da sam budala
voli me svaki blok kraj stek voli me svaka mahala 
reperi za mene su sala meni je mikrofon taj alat
bolje mi bezi bre pedala,hteo bi feat neka hvala  
ne mogu tik tok repere,hip hop trepere para
ne mogu da mi plate pa se zapale izgore ko cigara
stivena sigala glume ala nemaju signala 
ponela ih slava dali za to deo svog anala
u Srbiji sam tata,kralj bog,eminem pa alah 
tako govore ljudi za mene pa mi previsoka skala 
ovo je odvod,prati moj hod UFO moj brod
ljudi su govna neki su manji govnima su pod rod
ja sam pro pro nisam propo moj kod 
10 dina ovde sada uso sam u GOD MOde


Malo mi treba da napadnem likove
moji mi govore ne veruj nikome 
pojedem barove snerove bitove 
ne moze niko da ponovi i to me 
zele kopirati praviti hitove
da li je moguce neko da skine me 
picke mekane face im vilene
oni bi hteli dole da vide me 

ne mogu dole da budem ja gorim 
i gorivo tera me jako da lomi
i repere volim kad leze u komi
a lirika zube im polomi boli 
ti bogovi pitaju kako postojim
i rogovi rastu mi sebe se bojim
jebe se meni da pobede brojim
propali ovi tu reperi tvoji

Za 10 godina nisam postigo ono sto ti si 

zabole me ono sto mi visi 

razlika izmedju mene i tebe 
kad ja repovo sam ti si tati u testisu bio samo orhitis-guglaj

U prevodu bio si bol u mudima
svako se pita na sta tacno ja aludiram 
ovo skola je za sve a oni mi uzina 
radis playback to ti je kao sebi da aplaudiras 
boii

Vidim dredove te furas glumac
nisi lil pump mozda mala pumpica za kurac
dm rejpujes mi nisam do sad video te buraz 
ni spomenuo pa ne znam zasto se tu guras

hoces clout vidim da si nula 
jebo mir hocu rat evo kozna frula
posto vidim bas si zapeo da duvas 
takve jebem vec odavno nemoj tu da mi se kurvas
